description_long: This is a compact, modern desk lamp with a minimalist design, featuring a round, flat base that supports a slender, vertical stem. The stem bends at a right angle to hold a conical lampshade, which is angled downward to direct light onto a work surface. The lampshade is smooth and slightly flared, providing focused illumination. The entire lamp appears to be constructed from metal, giving it a sturdy and industrial look. Its matte black finish enhances its contemporary aesthetic, making it suitable for urban workspaces or study areas. The lamp is likely operated by a switch located near the base or on the cord, though this is not visible in the images.
description: A small, modern black desk lamp with a conical shade and minimalist metal construction, ideal for focused lighting on desks or tables.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled conical shade and the right-angled stem extending from the round base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular face of the lampshade and the slim vertical stem above the round base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the conical shade angled in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the lampshade and the straight alignment of the stem and base.
